nodes.name: Save Post to Google Drive
nodes.notes: Saves the generated HTML to a Google Drive folder for review before deployment. Set GDRIVE_BLOG_FOLDER_ID variable in n8n settings.

nodes.name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
nodes.notes: Pushes the new blog post directly to GitHub Pages via API. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN and repo access. GitHub Actions will auto-deploy.

nodes.name: Generate Social Media Posts
nodes.notes: Generates Twitter, LinkedIn, and Instagram posts for the new article

parameters.subject: =✅ New Blog Post Published: {{ $('Build HTML Page').first().json.title }}

nodes.name: Email Admin Notification
nodes.notes: Sends email with the new post details + social media copy ready to paste. Configure SMTP credentials in n8n.

nodes.name: Error Handler
nodes.notes: Catches errors in the workflow and logs them
